---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="year-banner"><div class="portrait" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div><div class="year-num">2009</div><div class="year-meta">56 posts this year. Showing first 56.</div></div></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<div id="year-months" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12"], y: [21, 11, 5, 7, 3, 4, 3, 2],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#0A2540" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 30, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      height: 210, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("year-months", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>

```{=html}
<div class="filter-bar"><div class="chips"><span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid">COVID / Health</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections">Elections &amp; Voting</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy">Energy</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general">General / Uncategorized</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media">Media</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad">Bad Nicknames</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good">Good Nicknames</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family">Personal &amp; Family</span> <span class="chip on" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="actions"><a onclick="window.trumpFilter.solo()">Show all</a><a onclick="window.trumpFilter.none()">Hide all</a><span class="muted">click a chip to solo &middot; shift-click to hide</span></div></div><div class="post-stream" id="stream-2009"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 04, 2009  13:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Be sure to tune in and watch Donald Trump on Late Night with David Letterman as he presents the Top Ten List tonight!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1698308935" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1698308935" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 04, 2009  20:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Donald Trump will be appearing on The View tomorrow morning to discuss Celebrity Apprentice and his new book Think Like A Champion!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1701461182" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1701461182" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 08, 2009  08:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Donald Trump reads Top Ten Financial Tips on Late Show with David Letterman: http://tinyurl.com/ooafwn - Very funny!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1737479987" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1737479987" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 08, 2009  15:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;New Blog Post: Celebrity Apprentice Finale and Lessons Learned Along the Way: http://tinyurl.com/qlux5e&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1741160716" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1741160716" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 12, 2009  09:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;My persona will never be that of a wallflower - I‚Äôd rather build walls than cling to them&#x27; --Donald J. Trump&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1773561338" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1773561338" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 12, 2009  14:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Miss USA Tara Conner will not be fired - &#x27;I&#x27;ve always been a believer in second chances.&#x27; says Donald Trump&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1776419923" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1776419923" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 13, 2009  12:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Listen to an interview with Donald Trump discussing his new book</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1786560616" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1786560616" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 14, 2009  11:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Strive for wholeness and keep your sense of wonder intact.&#x27; --Donald J. Trump http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1796477499" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1796477499" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 15, 2009  09:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Enter the &#x27;Think Like A Champion&#x27; signed book and keychain contest: http://www.trumpthinklikeachampion.com/contest/&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1806258917" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1806258917" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 16, 2009  17:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;When the achiever achieves</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1820624395" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1820624395" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 17, 2009  10:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Don‚Äôt be afraid of being unique - it&#x27;s like being afraid of your best self.&#x27; --Donald J. Trump http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1826225450" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1826225450" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 18, 2009  09:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;We win in our lives by having a champion&#x27;s view of each moment.&#x27; --Donald J. Trump http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1836131903" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1836131903" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 19, 2009  12:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;...these days...we could all use a little of the power of Trumpative thinking.&#x27; ‚ÄìBarnesandNoble.com http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1849558306" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1849558306" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 20, 2009  08:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Always know you could be on the precipice of something great.&#x27; --Donald J. Trump http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1859044981" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1859044981" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 20, 2009  17:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Read a great interview with Donald Trump that appeared in The New York Times Magazine: http://tinyurl.com/qsx4o6&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1864367186" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1864367186" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 21, 2009  21:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Keep it fast</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1878373267" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1878373267" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 22, 2009  11:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Don&#x27;t forget to enter the &#x27;Think Like A Champion&#x27; signed book and keychain contest: http://www.trumpthinklikeachampion.com/contest&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1884022748" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1884022748" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 23, 2009  11:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Did you know Donald Trump is on Facebook? http://www.facebook.com/DonaldTrump - Become a fan today!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1894284587" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1894284587" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 26, 2009  09:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Your higher self is in direct opposition to your comfort zone.&#x27; --Donald J. Trump http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1924074459" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1924074459" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 27, 2009  09:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Read an excerpt from Think Like A Champion by Donald J. Trump: http://bit.ly/11FHpR&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1936022874" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1936022874" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 28, 2009  13:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;You have to know when to call it quits and when to keep moving forward.&#x27; --Donald J. Trump http://www.trumpthinklikeachampion.com&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1949899014" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1949899014" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 03, 2009  13:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Check out Donald Trump&#x27;s new iGoogle Showcase page: http://bit.ly/DdD2A&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2019316195" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2019316195" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 05, 2009  13:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúIf you don&#x27;t have problems</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2045871770" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2045871770" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 08, 2009  15:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Last week to enter the &#x27;Think Like A Champion&#x27; signed book and keychain contest: http://www.trumpthinklikeachampion.com/contest/&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2080633709" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2080633709" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 14, 2009  09:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today is Donald Trump&#x27;s Birthday! Send him your B&#x27;day wishes here: http://www.facebook.com/DonaldTrump&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2165353946" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2165353946" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 15, 2009  18:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thanks to all for your thoughtful birthday wishes ‚Äì Donald Trump&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2184650461" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2184650461" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 18, 2009  08:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RE: FB Vanity URLs: SF Chronicle - &#x27;David Beckham was one of the first</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2222067805" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2222067805" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 21, 2009  09:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;- Wishing a Happy Father&#x27;s Day to all the Dad&#x27;s out there - YOU are a champion today and everyday! http://tinyurl.com/kn95ju&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2266041769" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2266041769" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 23, 2009  08:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúExpand your life every day.‚Äù ‚ÄìDonald J. Trump http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2294519255" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2294519255" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 24, 2009  17:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Donald Trump‚Äôs commercial-free WWE Raw does big rating: http://tinyurl.com/nxvquo&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2317112756" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2317112756" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 26, 2009  11:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RE: Michael Jackson: &#x27;He was a great friend and a spectacular entertainer. It‚Äôs a devastating loss!&#x27; -Donald J. Trump&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2346367430" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2346367430" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 30, 2009  08:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch a powerful and frank interview with Donald Trump about the economy on Greta Van Susteren&#x27;s On The Record: http://tinyurl.com/mmjked&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2403435685" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2403435685" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 04, 2009  18:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Here&#x27;s to a safe and happy Independence Day for one and all - Enjoy it! --Donald J. Trump&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2475429091" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2475429091" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 13, 2009  09:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Be aware of things that seem inexplicable because they can be a big step towards innovation.&#x27; --Donald J. Trump http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2614325575" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2614325575" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 15, 2009  08:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Donald Trump backs &#x27;Apprentice&#x27; Randal Pinkett for N.J. Lieutenant Governor: http://tinyurl.com/mvovzb&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2650952843" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2650952843" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 22, 2009  10:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congrats to winners from around the world who entered the &#x27;Think Like A Champion&#x27; signed book/keychain contest! http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2779566791" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2779566791" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2009  10:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Check out a list of Donald Trump&#x27;s books for summer reading at the Trump University Blog: http://tinyurl.com/knyswt&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_2891870497" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/2891870497" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2009  08:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Browse Donald Trump&#x27;s Summer Reading List for Business Success at the Trump University Blog: http://tinyurl.com/n5468r&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3124382438" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3124382438" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 11, 2009  09:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Think. That‚Äôs the first step. Use all your power to utilize and develop that capability&#x27; --Donald J. Trump http://tinyurl.com/pqpfvm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3246382217" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3246382217" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 14, 2009  09:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Ivanka is now on Twitter - You can follow her @ IvankaTrump - Have a terrific weekend!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3308367056" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3308367056" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 20, 2009  08:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;-- Watch Donald Trump&#x27;s recent appearance on The Late Show with David Letterman: http://tinyurl.com/klts6b&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3427503309" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3427503309" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 21, 2009  09:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch the Miss Universe competition LIVE from the Bahamas - Sunday</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3450626731" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3450626731" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 23, 2009  16:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Reminder: The Miss Universe competition will be LIVE from the Bahamas - Tonight @9pm (EST) on NBC: http://tinyurl.com/mrzad9&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3498743628" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3498743628" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 29, 2009  11:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;- Donald Trump bids to buy the Oreo Double Stuf Racing League. Check it out: http://www.nabiscoworld.com/oreo/dsrl/home.aspx&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3627328938" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3627328938" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 01, 2009  08:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;- More hysterical DSRL videos featuring Donald Trump and &#x27;Double Trump&#x27; plus enter Golden Lick Race Sweepstakes: http://tinyurl.com/6asujj&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3688564134" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3688564134" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 14, 2009  10:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Read Donald Trump&#x27;s Top Ten Tips for Success: http://tinyurl.com/mcn8yl&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_3982428551" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/3982428551" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 29, 2009  10:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;A lot of people have imagination</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_4472353826" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/4472353826" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 05, 2009  09:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;- Read what Donald Trump has to say about daughter Ivanka&#x27;s upcoming new book</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_4629116949" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/4629116949" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 14, 2009  09:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch video of Ivanka Trump sharing business advice with 4 entrepreneurial women on GMA: http://tinyurl.com/yk6hlfo&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_4862580190" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/4862580190" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 22, 2009  08:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hear Donald Trump discuss big gov spending</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_5069623974" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/5069623974" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 27, 2009  10:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;--From Donald Trump: &#x27;Ivanka and Jared‚Äôs wedding was spectacular</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_5203117820" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/5203117820" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 02, 2009  08:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;--Work has begun</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_5364614040" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/5364614040" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 16, 2009  15:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Donald Trump Partners with TV1 on New Reality Series Entitled</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_5775731054" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/5775731054" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 26, 2009  13:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wishing you and yours a very Happy and Bountiful Thanksgiving!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_6090839867" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/6090839867" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 03, 2009  13:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Trump International Tower in Chicago ranked 6th tallest building in world by Council on Tall Buildings &amp; Urban Habitat http://bit.ly/sqvQq&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_6312794445" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/6312794445" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2009"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2009.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 23, 2009  11:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;From Donald Trump: Wishing everyone a wonderful holiday &amp; a happy</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_6971079756" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/6971079756" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div><script src="../assets/filter.js"></script>
```


[← Back to all years](../timeline.qmd){.small-caps}
